user_system_path: Issue #301 active — one machine-readable source of truth for active issue, branch, PR, deployed SHA, runtime env, and DB-state version.
no_routing_contract: The agent must read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md, ACTIVE_SEAM_STATE.json, and the active issue before acting. Brandon should not have to reconcile drift.

terminal_state_authority.merge_through_rule: Merge-through is allowed only after local proof, GitHub checks green, forbidden work touched is NO, and the PR receipt records the source-truth closeout and terminal state.

allowed_files_raw: Issue #301 control-plane ledger and gate enforcement only.
forbidden_files_raw: No product work, no Slack/OAuth/API/send, no backend/auth/schema/dashboard/scoring/conviction changes until the control-plane seam closes.
required_browser_proof: Not required. This is a control-plane seam.
acceptance_condition: ACTIVE_SEAM_STATE.json is the single machine-readable control plane and the continuity gate passes against live GitHub/release truth.
stop_condition: Stop when the control-plane ledger and gates are aligned, or BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT if live GitHub/deploy truth cannot be verified.
anti_regression_checks: ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md stays within the line cap and names exactly one active seam
root markdown file count is bounded by gate:continuity (MAX 8)
a new governance rule may only be added by editing an existing keep-list file
no product work starts inside the control-plane seam
next_command: Write ACTIVE_SEAM_STATE.json and enforce it in scripts/continuity-gate.ts.
